title: PPG receives top honors for product innovation, DE&I at The Home Depot's 2023 Innovation Awards
text: PITTSBURGH--(BUSINESS WIRE)--PPG (NYSE: PPG) today announced that it has received two notable honors from retail partner The Home Depot as part of the retailer's annual Supplier Partnership Meeting. The GLIDDEN® floor paint and concrete stain product line by PPG featuring COOL SURFACE TECHNOLOGY™ formulation was named a 2023 Innovation Award winner – second runner up, and PPG was named as the Supplier Diversity Tier II Partner of the Year. The annual Home Depot Innovation Awards honor products.

title: Hugh Grant to retire from PPG board of directors; Michael Lamach appointed independent lead director
text: PITTSBURGH--(BUSINESS WIRE)--PPG (NYSE:PPG) today announced that Hugh Grant, 65, PPG independent lead director, has informed the board of directors of his decision to end his tenure as independent lead director, effective Oct. 1, and retire from the board at the end of the year. Grant joined the board in 2005 and has served on the Nominating and Governance Committee and the Human Capital Management and Compensation Committee, serving the last nine years as independent lead director. title: Tim Knavish elected PPG Chairman and CEO; Michael McGarry to retire as Executive Chairman
text: PITTSBURGH--(BUSINESS WIRE)--PPG (NYSE:PPG) today announced that its Board of Directors has unanimously elected PPG president and chief executive officer (CEO), Tim Knavish, 58, as chair of the company's Board of Directors and CEO, effective Oct. 1, 2023. title: DULUX Paints by PPG launches new take on neutrals with 2024 Colour of the Year, Limitless
text: TORONTO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--PPG (NYSE:PPG) today announced that DULUX™ Paints by PPG has selected Limitless (DLX1091-3) as its 2024 Colour of the Year. This fresh take on a neutral shade blends the invigorating power of a primary colour with the versatility of a warm neutral making it a perfect complement to any space.
